person.description: Humans, historical figures, authors, scholars, and intellectuals.

work.description: Literary works, essays, books, poems, treatises, and historical manuscripts cited by their specific title.

place.description: Geographical locations, cities, historical states, and geopolitical entities.

organization.description: Institutions, universities, academies, guilds, and historical corporate bodies.

event.description: Historical happenings, battles, conferences, festivals, and scheduled events.

concept.description: Abstract ideas, philosophical currents, literary movements, and theoretical categories.
